title: CensusRunResult — outcome persisted to core.census_runs.result
description: JSON Schema for the result JSONB column on core.census_runs (src/will/governance/census_runner.py). The column stores RepoCensus.model_dump(mode='json') — the complete CIM-0 census artifact — with an optional 'snapshot_file' key appended when snapshot=true was requested. The RepoCensus contract (contracts.repo_census / RepoCensus.json) governs the nested object structure; this schema documents the persistence boundary. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (persistence-boundary contract). Uses .schema.json suffix — intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

metadata.description: RepoCensusMetadata — run identity and schema version. Fields: run_id (str, UUID), timestamp (datetime ISO), core_version (str), schema_id ('core.cim.repo_census'), schema_version ('1.0.0').

repo.description: RepoInfo — basic repository identity. Fields: root_path (str), git_remote, git_branch, git_commit (all str|null).

tree.description: TreeStats — file tree statistics. Fields: total_files (int), total_directories (int), extensions (dict[str,int]), top_level_dirs (list[str]).

signals.description: ArchitecturalSignals — detected architectural markers. Boolean flags: has_src, has_intent, has_sql, has_tests, has_docs; plus dependency_files (list[str]).

summary.description: CensusSummary — aggregated governance statistics. Counts execution/mutation surfaces, write-zone breakdown, hotspot files, lane distribution, CLI entrypoints, and error count.

execution_surfaces.description: list[ExecutionSurface] — detected entry points. Each item has: path (str), type (str: cli_entrypoint|main_block|service_app), line (int|null).

mutation_surfaces.description: list[MutationSurface] — detected mutation capability. Each item has: path, type, operation, line, detail, write_zone, lane, allowlisted.

errors.description: list[CensusError] — non-fatal errors during census. Each item has: path (str), error_type (str), message (str).

snapshot_file.description: Repo-relative path where the census snapshot was persisted. Present only when the run was triggered with snapshot=true and persistence succeeded.
